title: persea borbonia var. humilis
intro: Persea borbonia var. humilis, also known as dwarf red bay or scrub red bay, is a variety of the Persea borbonia tree native to the southeastern United States. The plant's leaves and bark have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Persea borbonia var. humilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
